CustomField.formula: IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '特高' ), '21' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '高圧受配電盤' ), '22' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '変圧器' ), '23' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '高圧コンビ' ), '24' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '進相コンデンサ/リアクトル' ), '25' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '低圧・現場・リレー・ACB盤' ), '26' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'コントロールセンタ（C/C)' ), '27' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '中継端子・接地端子盤' ), '28' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '発電機' ), '29' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'UPS' ), '30' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'MELBAS' ), '31' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'MELSAS' ), '32' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '大型映像装置' ), '33' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '共通機器' ), '51' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '技派・予備品等、他社' ), '61' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '本支社専用' ), '62' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '材料' ), '71' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '施設' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '工事' ), '81' , '') ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 大分類コード（施設）
